_**User (2026-05-21 09:04:43Z)**_

this is my search and filter api from backend. implement search and filter functionality in the frontend in tutorfilterbar:
    // Search + Filter Route
    app.get("/tutors", async (req, res) => {
      const search = req.query.search;
      const category = req.query.category;
      const mode = req.query.mode;
      const registeredAfter = req.query.registeredAfter;   // e.g. 2025-05-01
      const registeredBefore = req.query.registeredBefore; // e.g. 2025-05-20

      let query = {};

      // Text Search
      if (search && search.trim() !== "") {
        query.$or = [
          { title: { $regex: search, $options: "i" } },
          { instructor: { $regex: search, $options: "i" } },
          { category: { $regex: search, $options: "i" } },
          { description: { $regex: search, $options: "i" } },
        ];
      }

      // Category Filter
      if (category && category !== "All") {
        query.category = category;
      }

      // Mode Filter
      if (mode && mode !== "All") {
        query.mode = mode;
      }

      // Date Range Filter (Registered After & Before)
      if (registeredAfter || registeredBefore) {
        query.bookingDate = {};           // ← Change field name if needed (createdAt / registeredAt)

        if (registeredAfter) {
          query.bookingDate.$gte = new Date(registeredAfter);
        }
        if (registeredBefore) {
          query.bookingDate.$lte = new Date(registeredBefore);
        }
      }

      const result = await tutorsCollection.find(query).toArray();
      res.json(result);
    });
